query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.financial_responsible_id,
  p.unit_id,
  p.doctor_user_id,
  p.modality,
  p.price_per_report,
  p.starts_at,
  p.ends_at,
  u.name AS doctor_name
FROM billing_doctor_modality_prices p
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = p.doctor_user_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
